problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
